lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: [long pause] [whispering] The meeting starts in two minutes and I forgot to prep the slides.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: [long pause] [alarmed] Which slides? The quarterly ones?

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: [long pause] Yes. [panicking] There are twelve charts and I've done zero of them.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: [long pause] Send them your last deck. Same charts, just change the date.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: [long pause] [dryly] I know. You owe me lunch. [long pause]
